title: piper rupestre
intro: Piper rupestre, also known as Chilean pepper or pepperwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Piperaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant's leaves, stems, and roots have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, offering benefits such as reducing pain, inflammation, and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of Piper rupestre include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's parts in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
